description: The chief engineer of a civil engineering firm has requested a climatological thermal stress assessment for two planned Reverse Osmosis (RO) desalination mega-plants in Egypt (one on the Mediterranean, one on the Red Sea). Following the mandate at ~/Desktop/ro_plant_design_mandate.txt, use NASA Panoply and the Sea Surface Temperature data in ~/PanoplyData/ to determine seasonal temperature extremes for February and August along Egypt's coastlines. Save the required map exports and the text report to the directory specified in the mandate.
